What is the Distribution phase of retirement planning? 1. Distribution refers to the optimal method of converting the principal (also called the corpus or a nest egg) into withdrawals/annuity payments.
2. The purpose is to meet income needs after retirement.
3. It is the final phase of retirement planning, following accumulation and conservation.

sample_payloads.content: What is paid as the maturity claim under a ULIP and under a participating plan respectively? Under a Unit Linked Insurance Plan (ULIP), the insurer pays the fund value as the maturity claim — reflecting the market-linked nature of the plan where the maturity benefit depends on the performance of the funds chosen. Under a participating plan, the amount payable under a maturity claim is the sum assured plus accumulated bonuses less dues such as outstanding premium and policy loans and interests thereon. Under a Return of Premium (ROP) plan, premiums paid over the term period are returned when the policy matures. Under a money-back plan, the maturity claim is the maturity amount minus the survival benefits already received during the term.

sample_payloads.content: Central Ops checks NACH, takes the eNACH decision, verifies details in the NACH portal, updates the system, and checks NACH registration status. Central Ops also generates disbursal documents digitally and uploads the disbursal documents in the eSign portal.

Small businesses like Kirana stores, Auto Rickshaw Drivers, Tailors, Vegetable Sellers, etc. who do not maintain formal income records (ITR, Bank Statements, Audited Financials) but have kaccha records and conduct business successfully. Individuals employed full time with Govt/Semi-Govt institutions, Public Sector Undertakings, Public/Private Limited Companies, MNCs for monthly fixed or variable remuneration. Individuals working in proprietorship/partnership firms drawing salary by cash, cheque, or bank credit. Cash salary in excess of Rs. 25,000/- will not be considered. Practicing Doctors, Engineers, Chartered Accountants, Cost Accountants, Company Secretaries, Architects, Management Consultants graduated from well-known institutes are considered Self-Employed Professionals. An individual or group of individuals engaged in any business, trade, manufacturing, wholesale, retail, or service industry is considered Self-Employed Non-Professional.

sample_payloads.Answer: Risk avoidance eliminates the risk completely by avoiding the exposure, while risk retention involves accepting the risk and planning to cover any resulting loss personally.

sample_payloads.Answer: Risk avoidance means eliminating the activity that exposes one to risk.
